response.overview: A one-off special produced by RCTV, originally written by César Miguel Rondón, starring Carlos Olivier and Roberto Moll, along with a large cast including Claudia Venturini, Esther Orjuela, Juan Frankis, Betty Hass, Pedro Durán, Domingo Del Castillo, Ileana Jacket, Lourdes Medrano, Belén Peláez, among others
response.title: Inocente en linea
